title.en: Somewhere in the Sea of Dimensions.

content.en:
Somewhere in the Sea of Dimensions.

With the help of this ten-sided crystal and the ten-sided Ultimate Void Technique, Ye Tian gradually opened up a ten-sided realm that was not too big.

Since then, a replica of his body has been sitting here for a long time, and he is still studying the ten crystals.

In this way, even if his copy body in the outside world was wiped out by a certain Ultimate Extreme Honor, there would be nothing wrong with his copy body.

Now, he really didn't need to fear the Ultimate Extremity, and this Ten Faces Realm was very special, even if the Sea of Dimensions was destroyed, it would not be discovered here.

Besides, even the Ultimate Extreme Venerable can't destroy the Sea of Dimensions.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian continued to study the ten-sided crystals, he had a copy of the body for research, and he could sacrifice the copy body, so the progress of his research was far from being comparable to that of the Palm Heaven Extreme Venerable.

The Palm Heaven Supreme Venerable didn't dare to risk his own life to study.

Therefore, Zhangtian Jizun's research on these ten-sided crystals is still very shallow, and in the end, he can only use the ten-sided crystals to save his life, but Ye Tian has really studied it in depth.

Gradually, he achieved more and more results.

"Arrow's Crystal!"

Ye Tian knew the name of the 197 ten-sided crystal, and it was also a little bit of information that he analyzed after in-depth understanding.

Moreover, through the crystal of the Arrow, he even sensed an unknown existence, and he didn't dare to explore it at all, otherwise it would be very dangerous.

In addition, through the crystal of the Arromu, he continued to perfect his ultimate rule of ten thousand laws, and the efficiency of perfection was extremely fast.

The crystal of Arromu seems to be able to connect countless ultimate paths, which is equivalent to a terminal, allowing him to understand countless ultimate paths, which is why he can perfect the ultimate path of ten thousand laws.

Time flies, and Ye Tian's understanding of the ultimate way of ten thousand laws is getting deeper and more perfect.

He felt that as long as he was given countless more Ultimate Era time, he would definitely be able to perfect the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao to the level of a high-level self-created Ultimate Dao.

Therefore, he decided to postpone the impact on the Ultimate Supreme Realm.

In this way, countless long years of the Ultimate Era have passed.

And with his help, the human race has become hundreds of times stronger (bfab) than in the past, and the number of Ultimate Realm Masters born has reached a large number, reaching hundreds, among which there are as many as six high-level Ultimate Realm Masters who have cultivated the ultimate body, and two Ancient Ultimate Realm Masters.

And Ye Tian himself has only improved his ultimate will a little, and the ultimate way of ten thousand laws has been perfected a lot, and his strength has not improved much.

this day.

The perfection of the ultimate way of ten thousand laws has broken through again, and it is truly comparable to the high-level self-created ultimate way.

This is also his current limit, even with the crystal of the Arrow, it will be difficult for him to continue to improve.

"You can impact the Ultimate Supreme Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

After all, he has been postponing it for countless years, and there is no point in postponing it any longer.

......

this day.

Ye Tian was preparing to attack the Ultimate Extremity, and the location where he would attack the Ultimate Extremity was located in the place where the energy of the Dimension Sea was the strongest—Hurricane Mountain.

Hurricane Mountain is a treasure land born when Ye Tian went to play the ultimate place, nothing special, but the energy is extremely rich.

However, Hurricane Mountain was filled with a terrifying hurricane force, and ordinary Ultimate Realm Lords couldn't stay here for long.

So, no forces occupy this place.

And the general Ultimate Realm Lord is not short of energy, so naturally he has no interest here.

But this time, Ye Tian needed too much energy to attack the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and Hurricane Mountain was undoubtedly the most suitable place to break through.

Of course.

Before breaking through, his other clone bodies guarded his surroundings to prevent other Ultimate Realm Masters from interfering with him.

In the Ultimate Void near here, all living beings were removed by him.

The ultimate will!

The ultimate rule of perfection!

The ultimate way of ten thousand laws created by yourself!

The ultimate body of ten thousand laws in the realm of perfection.

Ye Tian's foundation was too strong, and it was very difficult for him to attack the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and he was almost 100% able to break through successfully.

Now.

He sat cross-legged, and his ultimate will combined with the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws to make his body begin to turn into the most primitive ultimate particles, and then began to absorb the energy around him, as well as communicate with the origin of the ultimate rules, so as to absorb the energy of the ultimate source.

Each ultimate particle eventually evolves from a single ultimate particle to an end particle clone.

After reaching this step, countless ultimate particle clones turned into one, thus breaking the shackles and being promoted to the ultimate supreme.

And each of the ultimate particles of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable can be turned into a clone, and they all have incomparably terrifying strength.

Therefore, those powerful Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters were like ants in the eyes of the Ultimate Extreme Venerable, and they couldn't even defeat the weakest Ultimate Particle Clone.

Originally.

The Ultimate Extreme Projection that Ye Tian encountered in the Ultimate Tower was actually part of the power of the Ultimate Particle Clone, and it still suppressed the strength, otherwise, he would not be able to defeat it.

As time passed, as if the energy of Hurricane Mountain had been sucked out, it began to absorb the energy around it, sweeping through the vast territory.

And countless Ultimate Origin Energy was also absorbed by Ye Tian and turned into a part of him to strengthen the Ultimate Particle.

Gradually, Ye Tian's ultimate particles turned into ultimate particle clones.

At this point, if you don't create your own ultimate way, and your physical body is not tough enough, you will directly explode and die.

And Ye Tian's self-created Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao was too perfect and too powerful, and these ultimate particle clones couldn't have any effect on him at all.

After a long time, Ye Tian's whole body ultimate particle clone was born, and the next step was the fusion process.

This process is still very long, and there must not be a single mistake, otherwise it will still explode and die, and be abandoned and erased by the source of the ultimate rule.
